Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 163 upvotes, 14 comments
  2. NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All 24 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. The Social Smolnet 106 upvotes, 12 comments
  4. Attention Residuals 110 upvotes, 18 comments
  5. Work_mem: It's a Trap 26 upvotes, 2 comments
  6. Why I'm Not Worried About Running Out of Work in the Age of AI 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. An FAQ on Reinforcement Learning Environments 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  8. Meme Buildings 16 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis 36 upvotes, 6 comments
  10. Ghostling 46 upvotes, 9 comments
  11. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 518 upvotes, 183 comments
  12. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 147 upvotes, 54 comments
  13. Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 95 upvotes, 35 comments
  14. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 170 upvotes, 72 comments
  15. VisiCalc Reconstructed 154 upvotes, 65 comments
  16. OpenCode – The open source AI coding agent 335 upvotes, 160 comments
  17. Show HN: Baltic shadow fleet tracker – live AIS, cable proximity alerts 23 upvotes, 6 comments
  18. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 279 upvotes, 157 comments
  19. The worst volume control UI in the world (2017) 54 upvotes, 28 comments
  20. We rewrote our Rust WASM Parser in TypeScript – and it got 3x Faster 69 upvotes, 42 comments
  21. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  22. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 451 upvotes, 382 comments
  23. Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser 38 upvotes, 23 comments
  24. Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility 32 upvotes, 20 comments
  25. I love my dumb watches 58 upvotes, 52 comments
  26. A Japanese Glossary of Chopsticks Faux Pas 89 upvotes, 87 comments
  27. Discontinuation and reinitiation of dual-labeled GLP-1 receptor agonists 49 upvotes, 50 comments
  28. Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran 29 upvotes, 26 comments
  29. Show HN: Red Grid Link – peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth, no servers 9 upvotes, 7 comments

Last generated 8:30am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
